HOME.HERO_DESCRIPTION: From table arrangements to the digital photo album. Everything in one place.
HOME.STEP_1_DESC: Register as an administrator and generate a unique code for your big day.
HOME.STEP_2_DESC: Manage your tables, add event information and customize your guide.
HOME.STEP_3_DESC: Share the code with your guests so they can confirm and upload their photos.
HOME.TESTIMONIAL_TEXT: It was the best decision for our wedding. All guests knew where to sit and the digital album is a treasure.
HOME.FOOTER_COPYRIGHT: © 2026 Weddly Studio. Made with ❤️ for unforgettable moments.
HOME.WELCOME_SUBTITLE: What detail are we going to polish today?
HOME.CARD_TABLES_DESC: Organize the seating plan and guest groups.
HOME.CARD_DESIGN_DESC: Create invitations and programs with unique style.
HOME.CARD_GUIDE_DESC: Venue, schedule, menu and dress code.
HOME.CARD_ALBUM_DESC: Relive and upload the best moments of the day.
HOME.CARD_GUESTS_DESC: View, search and filter all wedding attendees.
HOME.TOUR_STEP_1_DESC: Welcome to your personal dashboard. Everything is ready for you to enjoy your big day.
HOME.TOUR_STEP_2_DESC: Don't miss anything. We'll notify you when someone uploads photos or there are last-minute changes.
HOME.TOUR_STEP_3_DESC: Upload photos to the album, check your table or review the schedule in one click.
HOME.TOUR_STEP_4_DESC: You can logout here, although we recommend keeping it open to receive notifications.
HOME.CARD_CHECKLIST_DESC: Manage all your wedding tasks and phases

WEDDINGS.TITLE: My Weddings

ONBOARDING.WELCOME_DESC:
We're going to set up your wedding in a few minutes.
We just need some basic details to get started.

ONBOARDING.GUESTS_TITLE: How many guests are you expecting?
ONBOARDING.GUESTS_DESC: An estimate helps us prepare everything better.
ONBOARDING.GUESTS_HINT: 💡 With more than 50 guests, consider our PRO plan for full access.
ONBOARDING.PRIORITY_TITLE: Where do you want to start?
ONBOARDING.PRIORITY_DESC: Choose the module you most urgently need to organize right now.
ONBOARDING.FIRST_GUEST_DESC: Start your list with someone special. You can skip this step.
ONBOARDING.READY_DESC: Your wedding is configured. You'll go directly to the module you chose.
ONBOARDING.CONFIRM_DESC: We've set everything up so you can start planning.

ONBOARDING.ERROR_CREATE: Error creating wedding. Please try again.

TFA.TITLE: Two-Factor Authentication
TFA.DESCRIPTION: Add an extra layer of security to your account
TFA.DISABLED_DESCRIPTION: With 2FA active, you'll need a code from your app (Google Authenticator, Authy...) every time you log in.
TFA.SCAN_QR_TITLE: Scan this QR with Google Authenticator or Authy
TFA.SCAN_QR_DESC: You can also enter the code manually.
TFA.ENTER_CODE_TITLE: Enter the 6-digit code that appears in your app to confirm.
TFA.ACCOUNT_PROTECTED: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
TFA.ACCOUNT_PROTECTED_DESC: You'll need your authenticator app every time you log in.
TFA.DISABLE_WARNING: ⚠️ To disable 2FA, confirm your current password.
TFA.SUCCESS_ACTIVATED_DESC: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.

RESET_CONFIRM.SUCCESS_DESC:
Two-factor authentication has been disabled successfully.
You can now log in with your email and password.
RESET_CONFIRM.ERROR_DEFAULT: The link may have expired (valid 30 min) or has already been used. Request a new one from the verification screen.

VERIFY.TITLE: Two-step verification
VERIFY.SUBTITLE: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
VERIFY.RESET_SENT_DESC: If the email is registered with 2FA active, you will receive a link within the next few minutes.

LEGAL.TERMS_S1_P1: By accessing and using Weddly Studio (hereinafter, 'the Service'), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the Service.
LEGAL.TERMS_S1_P2: These terms apply to all visitors, users and any other person who accesses or uses the Service.
LEGAL.TERMS_S2_INTRO: Weddly Studio is a wedding planning platform that allows users to:
LEGAL.TERMS_S2_LI1: Manage guest lists and table layouts
LEGAL.TERMS_S2_LI2: Create and share collaborative digital albums
LEGAL.TERMS_S2_LI5: Invite collaborators with different access levels
LEGAL.TERMS_S2_P2: The Service is provided 'as is' and 'as available'. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the Service at any time, with or without notice.
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_INTRO: To use certain features of the Service, you must create an account. By doing so, you agree to:
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_LI1: Provide truthful, accurate and complete information
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_LI2: Maintain the confidentiality of your password
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_LI3: Immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_LI4: Be responsible for all activity conducted from your account
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_P2: It is not permitted to create accounts in an automated manner or to impersonate another person or entity.
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_INTRO: Weddly Studio offers different access plans:
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_PLAN_FREE_DESC: Basic access at no cost, with limitations on guests and features.
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_PLAN_PRO_DESC: One-time payment of €49 per wedding, no monthly fees.
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_PLAN_PREMIUM_DESC: Monthly subscription of €14/month, with unlimited weddings and full access.
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_P2: Payments are processed securely via Stripe. We do not store credit card data. Prices are subject to change with prior notice.
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_P3: One-time payments are non-refundable except for technical errors attributable to Weddly Studio. Subscriptions can be cancelled at any time; access is maintained until the end of the billing period.
LEGAL.TERMS_S5_P1: The Service and its original content (excluding user-provided content) are the exclusive property of Weddly Studio and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
LEGAL.TERMS_S5_P2: Photographs, texts and other content uploaded by users remain the property of their authors. By uploading them, you grant Weddly Studio a limited, non-exclusive and non-transferable licence to store and display them within the Service.
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_LI1: Uploading illegal, offensive, defamatory content or content that infringes third-party rights
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_LI2: Attempting to gain unauthorised access to other systems or accounts
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_LI3: Using the Service to send unsolicited communications (spam)
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_LI4: Reverse engineering or attempting to extract the source code
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_LI5: Using the Service in a way that may damage, overload or deteriorate its functioning
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_P2: Non-compliance may result in immediate account suspension without right to a refund.
LEGAL.TERMS_S7_P1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Weddly Studio shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
LEGAL.TERMS_S7_P2: Weddly Studio does not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free or completely secure. Data is backed up periodically, but we recommend keeping your own copies of critical information.
LEGAL.TERMS_S8_P1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Substantial changes will be notified by email or via a prominent notice in the Service at least 15 days in advance.
LEGAL.TERMS_S8_P2: Continued use of the Service after the publication of changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
LEGAL.TERMS_S9_INTRO: For any queries related to these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us via:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S1_P1: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we inform you that the data controller is:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_INTRO: We collect only the data necessary to provide the Service:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_CAT1_DESC: name, surname, email address and encrypted password.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_CAT2_DESC: wedding name, date, venue, address and dress code.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_CAT3_DESC: name, email, dietary restrictions and confirmation status, entered by the organising user.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_CAT4_DESC: images voluntarily uploaded by the user or their guests to the digital album.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_CAT5_DESC: handled securely via Stripe or PayPal. Weddly Studio does not store complete card data.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S3_INTRO: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S3_LI1: Managing registration and access to the platform.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S3_LI2: Providing contracted services according to the active plan.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S3_LI4: Sending transactional communications related to the Service (email verification, reminders, notifications).
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S4_P1: The processing of your data is based on:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S4_LI1: Performance of the Service contract (art. 6.1.b GDPR).
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S4_LI3: Your explicit consent for optional communications (art. 6.1.a GDPR).
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S5_P1: We will retain your data for as long as you maintain an active account on the platform. After account deletion, data will be erased within a maximum of 30 days, unless there is a legal obligation to retain it.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S5_P2: Billing data is retained for the minimum period required by applicable tax legislation (generally 5 years).
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_INTRO: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_RIGHT1_DESC: know what data we process about you.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_RIGHT3_DESC: request deletion of your data ('right to be forgotten').
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_RIGHT4_DESC: request that we restrict the processing of your data.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_RIGHT5_DESC: receive your data in a structured, readable format.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_RIGHT6_DESC: object to processing in certain circumstances.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_CONTACT: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S7_P1: We implement technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S7_LI3: Multi-tenant isolation: each wedding is a strictly separate environment.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S7_P2: Despite our security measures, no system is entirely infallible. In the event of a data breach affecting your data, we will notify you within the legally established timeframe.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S8_P1: For the provision of the Service, we share data with the following trusted providers, who act as data processors:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S8_GCAL: Optional export of events to the user's calendar.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S8_P2: All our providers comply with the GDPR and have adequate safeguards in place for the protection of your data.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S9_P1: We use strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the Service:
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S9_COOKIE1_DESC: Keep your session active while using the platform.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S9_COOKIE2_DESC: Store your language and configuration preferences.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S9_P2: We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies. You can manage cookies from your browser settings.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S10_P1: Weddly Studio is not directed at persons under 16 years of age. If we detect that we have collected data from a minor without the consent of their legal guardians, we will proceed to delete it immediately. If you are a parent or guardian and believe that your child has provided personal data through our platform, please contact us.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S11_INTRO: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, you can contact us at:

COLLABORATORS.SUBTITLE: Manage who has access to your wedding and with what role.

COLLABORATORS.HINT_PLANNER: 📋 Can edit information, manage guests and tables. Cannot invite.
COLLABORATORS.HINT_GUEST: 👁️ Can only view the checklist and photo album.
